footer.tagline: Cyprus's smartest marketplace for buying and selling anything.

hero.title: Discover anything in Cyprus
hero.subtitle: Smart search, instant messaging, verified sellers. A marketplace designed for the way you actually want to buy and sell.

recent.title: Just Listed
recent.emptyDesc: The marketplace is brand new. Get ahead of the crowd and list something today.

why.title: Built different, on purpose
why.feature1Desc: Upload photos and AI fills out your listing. Get pricing suggestions based on what similar items actually sell for.
why.feature2Desc: Verified sellers, real reviews, and automated spam detection. Every transaction happens between real people.
why.feature3Desc: Real-time messaging that actually works. No email chains, no phone tag. Just direct conversations.

messages.title: Messages
messages.startConversation: Start a conversation by making an offer or contacting a seller.

hero.title: The marketplace built for real people
hero.subtitle: NextBazar started with a simple belief: buying and selling locally should be fast, safe, and actually enjoyable. We built the platform we always wished existed.

mission.title: Making every transaction seamless
mission.desc: To make every transaction in Cyprus — from a second-hand sofa to a pre-owned BMW — as seamless, transparent, and trustworthy as buying from a friend. No hidden fees, no dark patterns, no noise.

values.title: Our values
values.trustDesc: Every listing is reviewed and our community reporting tools keep the platform clean and safe for everyone.
values.speedDesc: Post an ad in under 2 minutes. Real-time messaging and instant notifications mean deals happen fast.
values.communityDesc: We're built for real people, not bots. Verified profiles, honest reviews, and fair pricing tools put the community in control.
values.localDesc: Rooted in Cyprus, NextBazar is designed for face-to-face commerce — with smart location filters and WhatsApp/Telegram contact options.

cta.title: Ready to start selling?
cta.subtitle: Post your first ad for free and reach thousands of buyers today.

shops.subtitle: Discover trusted Pro Seller shops from across Cyprus. Each shop is run by a verified, premium seller.

shops.noShopsYetDesc: Be the first to open a dealer shop on NextBazar!

hero.subtitle: A question, a problem, or just want to say hello — we'd love to hear from you. Our team usually responds within one business day.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NextBazar, we believe privacy is fundamental. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with GDPR and Cyprus data protection law.
privacy.informationWeCollectDesc: We collect information you provide directly and information collected automatically when you use NextBazar:
privacy.accountInformationDesc: Name, email address, phone number, payment information, and profile details when you register or post listings.
privacy.listingDataDesc: Photos, descriptions, location, category, and pricing information for items you list.
privacy.communicationDataDesc: Messages, reviews, and ratings between buyers and sellers.
privacy.deviceInformationDesc: IP address, browser type, device type, and operating system.
privacy.usageDataDesc: Pages visited, search queries, time spent on the platform, and other activity analytics.
privacy.useProvideServices: Provide, maintain, and improve NextBazar services
privacy.useProcessTransactions: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.useSendTechnical: Send technical notices and support messages
privacy.useRespondComments: Respond to your comments and questions
privacy.useMonitorAnalyze: Monitor and analyze trends and usage patterns
privacy.useDetectFraud: Detect, prevent, and address fraud and security issues
privacy.dataSharingDesc: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:
privacy.serviceProvidersDesc: Payment processors, hosting providers, and analytics services who help operate the platform.
privacy.otherUsersDesc: Your name, profile picture, and listing information are visible to other NextBazar users.
privacy.legalRequirementsDesc: When required by law or to protect our rights and safety.
privacy.cookiesAndTrackingDesc: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. For detailed information about our cookie practices, please visit our
privacy.yourDataRightsDesc: Under GDPR and Cyprus data protection regulations, you have the right to:
privacy.rightAccess: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
privacy.rightCorrection: Correction: Request we correct inaccurate information
privacy.rightDeletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.rightRestriction: Restriction: Request we limit how we use your data
privacy.rightPortability: Portability: Receive your data in a portable format
privacy.rightObjection: Objection: Object to processing for direct marketing
privacy.rightWithdrawConsent: Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time
privacy.exerciseRightsDesc: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below.
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, and destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security, but we are committed to protecting your information.
privacy.dataRetentionDesc: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, and resolve disputes. Account information is retained for the duration of your account and for a reasonable period afterward for legal compliance.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have concerns about our privacy practices or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer:
privacy.privacyResponseTime: We will respond to all privacy requests within 30 days as required by law.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of NextBazar. By registering or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: March 2026 • Cyprus Law Jurisdiction
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing and using NextBazar, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the platform. These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Cyprus, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.eligibilityAge: Be at least 18 years of age
terms.eligibilityCapacity: Have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements
terms.eligibilityResidence: Reside in Cyprus or be authorized to conduct business here
terms.eligibilityProhibited: Not be prohibited from using online marketplaces by law
terms.eligibilityAccurate: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.accountRegistrationDesc: When you create a NextBazar account, you agree to:
terms.accountAccurate: Provide accurate, current, and complete information
terms.accountPassword: Maintain the confidentiality of your password
terms.accountNotify: Notify us immediately of unauthorized access
terms.accountResponsibility: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
terms.accountLawful: Use your account only for lawful purposes
terms.accountSecurity: NextBazar is not responsible for any loss or damage arising from your failure to maintain account security or from unauthorized access to your account.
terms.listingRulesDesc: When posting listings, you agree that all content must be:
terms.listingOwned: Original content you own or have rights to use
terms.listingCompliant: Compliant with all applicable Cyprus and EU laws
terms.listingOffensive: Free from offensive, abusive, or discriminatory language
terms.listingIP: Not infringing on intellectual property rights
terms.listingOwnership: You retain ownership of your content but grant NextBazar a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute your listings on the platform.
terms.prohibitedItemsDesc: You may not list or sell items or engage in activities that are:
terms.prohibitedIllegal: Illegal under Cyprus or international law
terms.prohibitedCounterfeit: Counterfeit, stolen, or subject to legal claims
terms.prohibitedDrugs: Drugs, alcohol, or tobacco (except age-restricted legal sales)
terms.prohibitedOrgans: Human organs, blood, or biological materials
terms.prohibitedAdult: Services for escort, sexual, or adult content
terms.prohibitedHate: Hate speech, harassment, or defamatory content
terms.prohibitedViolation: Violation of these rules may result in immediate removal of listings and account suspension.
terms.conductHarass: Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
terms.conductFraud: Engage in fraud, scams, or deceptive practices
terms.conductAutomated: Use automated tools to scrape or access the platform
terms.conductUnauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems
terms.conductInterfere: Interfere with platform functionality or security
terms.conductPrice: Engage in price fixing or manipulation
terms.liabilityDesc: NextBazar provides the platform "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee:
terms.liabilityAccuracy: The accuracy or quality of listings or user information
terms.liabilityCompletion: That transactions will be completed successfully
terms.liabilityHonesty: The honesty, reliability, or behavior of users
terms.liabilityIndirect: To the maximum extent permitted by Cyprus law, NextBazar shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform or any transaction between users.
terms.liabilityFacilitates: NextBazar facilitates transactions between users but is not a party to transactions. We are not responsible for disputes, losses, or damages arising from transactions between buyers and sellers.
terms.disputeResolutionDesc: In case of disputes between users:
terms.disputeGoodFaith: Users agree to attempt good-faith resolution directly
terms.disputeMediation: NextBazar may provide a mediation service at our discretion
terms.disputeProceeds: Disputes not resolved may proceed to Cyprus courts
terms.disputeJurisdiction: Both parties agree to jurisdiction under Cyprus law
terms.disputeGoverned: All disputes arising from these Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Cyprus and resolved exclusively in the courts of Cyprus.
terms.feesDesc: NextBazar offers free listing for users. When fees are charged for premium features:
terms.feesDisclosed: Fees are clearly disclosed before purchase
terms.feesCharged: Charges are processed securely through trusted payment providers
terms.feesRefund: Refund policies are stated with each service offering
terms.feesResponsible: You are responsible for all charges incurred under your account
terms.terminationDesc: NextBazar may suspend or terminate your account:
terms.terminationProhibited: For prohibited activities or illegal conduct
terms.terminationDiscretionary: At our sole discretion with or without notice
terms.terminationCease: Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately. Active listings will be removed and any pending transactions may be cancelled.
terms.intellectualPropertyDesc: All NextBazar platform content, design, functionality, and trademarks are the exclusive property of NextBazar or our licensors. You may not reproduce, modify, distribute, or transmit any NextBazar content without written permission. User-generated content (listings, reviews) remains the property of the user but is subject to our license to use and display it.
terms.changesTermsDesc: NextBazar reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes become effective when posted. Your continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of modified terms. We recommend reviewing this page regularly for updates.
terms.questionsTerms: Questions about our Terms of Service?

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how NextBazar uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience while respecting your privacy and complying with EU cookie regulations.
cookies.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They contain information that helps websites recognize your device and remember your preferences. Cookies are essential for many online services and help provide a better user experience. Similar tracking technologies include web beacons, pixels, and local storage.
cookies.cookiesUnderstand: Understand how you use our platform
cookies.cookiesDetect: Detect and prevent fraud and security threats
cookies.cookiesAnalyze: Analyze platform performance and user behavior
cookies.cookiesRelevant: Show you relevant content and personalized features
cookies.essentialCookiesDesc: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function properly. They enable core functionality like login, account security, and basic navigation.
cookies.essentialSession: Session ID: Maintains your login session
cookies.essentialPreferences: Preferences: Saves language and basic settings
cookies.essentialNote: These cookies are always active and cannot be disabled without breaking platform functionality.
cookies.analyticsCookiesDesc: These cookies help us understand how users interact with NextBazar. We use this information to improve features, fix bugs, and optimize performance.
cookies.analyticsUsage: Usage Data: Pages visited, time on site, search queries
cookies.analyticsDevice: Device Info: Browser type, device, operating system
cookies.analyticsPerformance: Performance: Page load times and feature usage
cookies.preferenceCookiesDesc: These cookies remember your preferences to personalize your experience, such as language choice, UI customizations, and saved searches.
cookies.preferenceFilters: Search Filters: Recently used categories and locations
cookies.preferenceDisplay: Display Settings: UI preferences and themes
cookies.marketingCookiesDesc: These cookies are used to track your behavior across websites and serve you with relevant advertisements. Third-party partners may also place cookies on our platform.
cookies.marketingAdvertising: Advertising: Shows relevant ads based on interests
cookies.marketingSocial: Social Media: Enables social sharing features
cookies.marketingThirdParty: Third-Party Partners: Payment processors, analytics tools
cookies.marketingImportant: Important: Marketing cookies require your explicit consent and can be disabled.
cookies.durationSession: Session Cookies: Expire when you close your browser
cookies.durationPersistent: Persistent Cookies: Remain on your device for months or years
cookies.durationEssential: Essential Cookies: Usually expire after 1-2 years
cookies.durationAnalytics: Analytics Cookies: Typically expire after 13 months
cookies.privacyRightsDesc: Under EU cookie regulations (ePrivacy Directive and GDPR):
cookies.consentEssential: Essential Cookies: May be used without consent as they're necessary for service functionality.
cookies.consentOther: Other Cookies: Require your explicit informed consent before being placed.
cookies.consentManagement: Consent Management: You can change your preferences at any time using our cookie settings.
cookies.consentWithdrawal: Withdrawal: You can withdraw consent to non-essential cookies without penalty.
cookies.manageDesc: You have multiple ways to control cookies:
cookies.manageSiteDesc: Most browsers display a cookie consent banner when you first visit NextBazar. You can:
cookies.manageAccess: Access settings later from your account preferences
cookies.manageView: View stored cookies and delete them
cookies.manageBlock: Block new cookies from being set
cookies.manageDelete: Delete cookies when closing the browser
cookies.manageBrowserNote: Please note: Disabling essential cookies may prevent some platform features from working properly.
cookies.manageDNTDesc: If your browser sends a Do Not Track signal, NextBazar will respect your preference where technically feasible and honor opt-out requests for marketing cookies.
cookies.thirdPartyDesc: NextBazar may link to external websites and use third-party services (payment processors, analytics providers, social media platforms). These sites have their own cookie policies and privacy practices. NextBazar is not responsible for third-party cookies. Please review their policies when visiting external links.
cookies.updatesPolicyDesc: NextBazar may update this Cookie Policy periodically to reflect changes in our cookie practices or applicable regulations. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy here with a new "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
cookies.questionsDesc: If you have questions about how NextBazar uses cookies or want to manage your preferences, please contact us:
cookies.cookieResponse: We'll respond to cookie-related inquiries within 48 hours.
cookies.relatedDesc: For information about how we handle your personal data, see our
cookies.relatedTerms: For terms governing use of the platform, see our

safety.title: Stay safe on NextBazar
safety.intro: The vast majority of transactions on our platform go smoothly. These tips will help you spot the rare bad actor and keep every deal secure.
safety.meetPublicDesc: Always arrange to meet in a busy, well-lit public location — a café, shopping centre, or police station parking lot. Never meet at your home or an isolated location.
safety.inspectBeforeDesc: Examine the item in person before handing over any money. Test electronics, check for damage, and verify it matches the listing description.
safety.paySafelyDesc: Prefer cash for in-person deals. If paying digitally, use a trusted payment service with buyer protection. Never pay via gift cards, wire transfer, or cryptocurrency for marketplace goods.
safety.checkProfileDesc: Look at the seller's rating, reviews, and how long they've been a member. Verified badges indicate the account has been confirmed.
safety.tooGoodToBeTrue: If it seems too good to be true…
safety.tooGoodDesc: Drastically underpriced items, sellers who can't meet in person, or pressure to pay quickly are all red flags. Trust your instincts.
safety.keepOnPlatformDesc: Use NextBazar's built-in messaging for the initial conversation. Avoid moving to external apps before you've confirmed the deal is legitimate.
safety.neverShareDesc: Don't share your home address, bank account number, or ID before you've confirmed the buyer is genuine.
safety.cautiousDesc: Scammers often send a cheque for more than the asking price and ask you to refund the difference. The original payment will bounce — you'll lose both the item and the money.
safety.avoidShipping: Avoid buyers who want to ship
safety.avoidShippingDesc: For high-value items, prefer local buyers who collect in person. Shipping scams often involve fake payment confirmations.
safety.verifyPaymentDesc: Wait for cash to be counted or for a bank transfer to fully clear in your account before releasing the item.
safety.flagRefuses: Seller/buyer refuses to meet in person
safety.flagPrice: Price is dramatically below market value
safety.flagGiftCard: Payment requested via gift card or crypto
safety.flagOverpay: Overpayment with request to refund difference
safety.flagPressure: Pressure to complete the deal quickly
safety.flagOffPlatform: Request to continue chat off-platform immediately
safety.reportText1: Open the listing or message thread
safety.reportText3: Select a reason and add details
safety.reportEmail: You can also email us at
safety.teamHere: Our trust & safety team is here to help.
